title: Bordeless Lapis
description: Removes the strange border around blocks of lapis, just like how it was before 1.6.1.
body:
Have you ever seen that pesky border around blocks of lapis and thought _"man I wish that border wasn't there, but still retained its textures from the texture update"_? Well if you have had that extremely specific thought this resource pack is for you!

[Bedrock version](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/borderless-lapis/)
